title: WiscWeb -  Photo and icon resources
body: Campus Photo Library DoIT Communications icon library Office of Strategic Communications icon libraries Stock photos Placeholder imagery Campus Photo Library The Campus Photo Library is a collection of digital photos that depict the UW Madison campus, its various events, and its people. These high resolution photos are able to be downloaded in the original dimensions or the following sizes: 4800px (x-large) 2400px (large) 1200px (medium) 600px (small) Photos can also be saved in a “lightbox” to be shared with co-workers and project teammates. A robust search tool allows users to easily find photos based on keywords and other parameters. Campus Photo Library (must login with NetID) DoIT Communications icon library DoIT Communications has created an icon pack for use by website owners. These are located in UW Box and available for download by campus fac/staff. DoIT Icon Library (must login to UW Box) Office of Strategic Communications icon libraries Office of Strategic Communications also has a couple icon packs available to website owners. These are located in UW Box and available for download by campus fac/staff. Strategic Communications Icons for Digital Use Strategic Communications Illustrations for Digital Use More graphic elements are available on the brand.wisc.edu website . Stock photos Stock photos can be downloaded from various 3rd party vendor sites. However, it is important to note the terms/guidelines/policies for use. Some may require you cite the photographer, vendor, etc. Burst Unsplash Stock Snap New Old Stock Startup Stock Photos Gratisography Placeholder imagery Placeholders can be used when you are still waiting for content to be written or images to be chosen. They offer a realistic way to preview certain page elements without having to have content ready. Placeholder Images See Also UW Theme Classic  -  Using the Hero Content Area WiscWeb -  Using Photoshop to Crop Images
